description: Into the Fray Patch 6 (14 September 2022) — Japanese and Italian language support, Guild Finder, Season 17, Crystal Arena Changes, Hideout Booster Changes, Treasure Chest Adjustments, Might Level Changes, Corrupted Dungeon Changes, Hideout Crafting, Study Fame, Economy Adjustments, Fixes.

sections.heading: Japanese and Italian Added
sections.description: Albion Online now offers full language support for Japanese and Italian, selectable from the launcher or in-game Settings. Dedicated chat channels and forums have been added.
sections.searchable_text: Japanese Italian language support launcher Settings chat channels forums

sections.heading: Guild Finder
sections.description: A new Guild Finder allows players to easily find a suitable guild. Accessible via the guild dropdown or Shift+G. Three tabs: beginner-friendly recommendations, guild name search, and multi-filter options. Guild Leaders now have a Recruitment Tab in Guild Management. Feature will be enabled once sufficient data is gathered.
sections.searchable_text: Guild Finder guild dropdown Shift+G beginner-friendly search filter Recruitment Tab Guild Management data

sections.heading: Season 17 Overview
sections.description: Albion's 17th Guild Season kicks off on September 17. This season is one week shorter than a standard season (to avoid Season 18 beginning on December 24) and will offer tripled points during the final weeks. Players must be a member of the qualifying guild for at least 75% of the season to receive rewards.
sections.searchable_text: Season 17 September 17 shorter tripled points 75% qualifying guild Crystal Arena Hideout Boosters Open-World Treasures

sections.heading: Crystal Arena Changes
sections.description: Starting with Season 17, additional substeps are added to Crystal Arena ranking (Iron I-IV, Bronze I-IV, Silver I-IV, Gold I-IV, Crystal). Rankings will not fully reset at season end — players will be partially ranked down (e.g. Crystal Rank players start next season at Silver I). Skipped Rank Up Rewards are still earned via in-game mail.
items: Full list of ranks starting with Season 17: Iron I-IV, Bronze I-IV, Silver I-IV, Gold I-IV, Crystal
At the start of the next Arena Season, players will be partially instead of fully down-ranked
The Arena Master now only accepts new Arena Sigils; old Discontinued Arena Sigils can be salvaged for a 10% chance at a T4 Royal Sigil
sections.searchable_text: Crystal Arena ranking substeps Iron Bronze Silver Gold Crystal down-ranked Arena Sigils salvaged Royal Sigil Season 17

sections.heading: Hideout Booster Changes
items: Boosters are no longer earned at the end of a season
Instead, every guild always has a Booster (beginning with guild creation)
To use the Booster, the guild must still meet the current HQ Hideout requirements (Season Point Threshold of the current or previous season)
After use, the Booster goes on a 90-day cooldown
sections.searchable_text: Hideout Booster guild creation HQ Season Point Threshold 90-day cooldown

sections.heading: Treasure Chest Adjustments
sections.searchable_text: Treasure Chest Small open 5 min 3 min respawn Legendary Regular value 20% large halved

subsections.heading: Treasure Chest Changes
subsections.searchable_text: Small Treasure Chest 5 min 3 min Legendary Regular loot 20% large chance halved increased value

changes.raw_text: Small Treasure Chests now open more quickly: 5 min → 3 min. Respawn time adjusted accordingly.
notes: Loot distribution now puts less emphasis on Legendary Chests; Regular Chest loot value increased by 20%
Halved chance for a large treasure chest to spawn, but increased value accordingly

sections.heading: Might Level Changes
sections.searchable_text: Might Level Crystal Spiders 20000 10000 Corrupted Dungeons 4000 3000 2v2 Hellgates 5000 4000 5v5 Hellgates 7000 5000

subsections.heading: Might Level Changes
subsections.searchable_text: Crystal Spiders Might First Level 20000 10000 halved Corrupted Dungeons 4000 3000 2v2 Hellgates 5000 4000 5v5 Hellgates 7000 5000

changes.raw_text: Crystal Spiders: Might Requirement First Level: 20,000 → 10,000. Might Level Requirements for all subsequent levels halved (each Crystal Spider effectively gives twice the Season Points).
notes: Might Level Requirements for all subsequent levels halved

changes.raw_text: Corrupted Dungeons: Might Requirement Increase per Level: 4,000 → 3,000
2v2 Hellgates: Might Requirement Increase per Level: 5,000 → 4,000
5v5 Hellgates: Might Requirement Increase per Level: 7,000 → 5,000

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes
sections.description: Players can now directly enter a new Corrupted Dungeon after defeating another player or being banished.
items: If a player defeats another player or is banished, the Exit Dungeon ability cast time is shortened back to 7s
After successfully casting Exit Dungeon, the player can choose to directly enter a new Corrupted Dungeon
Downing an invader on Hunter level now sends the invader back into the open world
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon direct enter defeat banished Exit Dungeon 7s Hunter invader open world

sections.heading: Hideout Crafting Changes
sections.description: Crafting bonuses from Power Levels for Hideouts changed from a multiplicative bonus to an additive +1% bonus to general crafting and +2% bonus to specialist crafting per power level (total +3% for specialist recipes). This reduces very large bonuses while affecting lower-quality zones less.
sections.searchable_text: Hideout Crafting Power Levels multiplicative additive 1% general 2% specialist 3% bonus quality zones

sections.heading: Study Fame Changes
items: Local Bonuses no longer increase Fame received from studying, but the base Study Fame Factor has been increased from 2 to 2.75
In a Specialist City, this results in an increase from 2.66 to 2.75
Daily Production Bonus events still apply a multiplier to Studying Fame
Focus can still be used on Studying and is multiplicative with all other bonuses
sections.searchable_text: Study Fame Local Bonuses Study Fame Factor 2 2.75 Specialist City 2.66 Daily Production Bonus Focus multiplicative

sections.heading: Economy Adjustments
items: Increased Silver sinks and reduced Silver faucets by around 10% across the board
Increased market order setup fee and sales fee by one percentage point (two for non-Premium characters)
sections.searchable_text: Economy Silver sinks faucets 10% market order setup fee sales fee Premium

sections.heading: Other Changes and Improvements
items: Activity Hub now displays notifications for new events
Added win / lose / draw overhead message after duels
Updated minimap party icon for better readability
Added role colors to party members on minimap and zone map
Added "Always" option for entering Roads of Avalon portals that will close soon
Battle Mount combat spells are now disabled in yellow zones
Removed the Taunt VFX from Concussive Blow to make it more readable during combat
[Mobile] Improved scaling of various UI windows
[Mobile] Added option to disable zoom camera
[Controller] Controller buttons can now be assigned as Hotkeys; added auto-run option
sections.searchable_text: Activity Hub notifications duels minimap party icon role colors Roads of Avalon portals Battle Mount yellow zones Concussive Blow Taunt VFX Mobile scaling zoom Controller Hotkeys auto-run

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where spell indicator areas would sometimes not display
Fixed issue where Faction Outposts could be captured with defenders still in the circle
Fixed issue where incorrect loot bonus percentage was displayed in loot UI
Hotkey element on spell icons now displays correct info
Fixed issue where closing and reopening the Rights UI would produce a blank window
Fixed issue where Thetford Cape's Chain Lightning effect showed wrong values on Training Dummies
Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff) now only applies immunities if the stun successfully triggers; if blocked the target will not gain immunity and the animation will not freeze
Fixed rare issue where players could become stuck after changing zones and casting spells very quickly
[Mobile] Fixed issue where spells on cooldown could be dragged and cast in wrong direction after cooldown expired
[Mobile] Fixed issue where some spell re-activations would use the wrong spell target (Glacial Obelisk, Shock Wave, Avalanche)
Various additional graphical, UI, terrain, animation, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes spell indicator Faction Outposts defenders loot UI Hotkey Rights UI Thetford Cape Chain Lightning Time Freeze Great Arcane Staff immunity stun stuck zones Mobile cooldown Glacial Obelisk Shock Wave Avalanche graphical UI terrain animation audio localization
